name: Audio transcription and AI summary to Google Drive
description: Lists audio attachments from Gmail, uses Claude AI to generate transcription notes and summaries, saves structured summaries to Google Drive, and sends a notification email with the results.

source.originalName: Use OpenAI to transcribe audio + summarize with AI + save to Google Drive

gmailListKey.description: Gmail connection key for listing emails with audio attachments

gmailSendKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending notification emails

driveKey.description: Google Drive connection key for saving transcription summaries

driveFolderId.description: Google Drive folder ID to save transcription documents

notificationEmail.description: Email address to notify when transcription is complete

audioDescription.description: Description of the audio content to summarize (e.g. meeting notes, interview transcript, voice memo text)

steps.name: Build AI prompt for audio content summarization
Run Claude AI for transcription summary
Build summary document for Drive upload
Upload summary document to Google Drive
